title: trachyandra thyrsoidea
intro: Trachyandra thyrsoidea, also known as the 'Red-hot poker plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trachyandra thyrsoidea include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, often made by boiling the roots in water to create a medicinal tea.
